revision_priority: Add one explicit Scala-based pipeline or transformation clause in an existing TikTok or DiDi bullet so the JD must-have Scala requirement has body evidence.

revision_instructions: Make two surgical edits. First, add one Scala-supported clause to an existing data-pipeline bullet, ideally in DiDi or TikTok, so the resume shows real Scala usage in the body while keeping Scala in Skills. Second, clean the presentation layer by unbolding modifier words like `team-maintained`, `existing`, `internal`, and `lightweight`, and add a brief note to the Education lines that the two M.S. programs are concurrent or part-time so the identical May 2026 dates do not read as a timeline inconsistency.
